## Meeting Purpose

[Impromptu catch-up and strategic discussion between Marcel and Demetrios on business operations, challenges, and potential solutions for their growing company.](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is experiencing significant growth but feeling overwhelmed with workload and the need for more efficient processes](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [The company needs to focus on talent acquisition, training, and delegation to scale effectively](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Demetrios will take on more sales responsibilities to alleviate Marcel's workload](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Design resources and community management are areas requiring immediate attention](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Topics

### Business Growth and Challenges

  - [Company is 3-4 months in, showing positive signals but feeling fragile](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Marcel feeling overwhelmed with workload, working until midnight to catch up](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Need for better processes and delegation to avoid burnout](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Struggle to balance high-energy client interactions with exhaustion](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)

### Talent Acquisition and Training

  - [New hires starting, including Bsera joining today](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Urgent need for comprehensive training program to get new hires up to speed quickly](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Goal: After 3 months, new hires should be as proficient as Sedera](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Importance of investing time in onboarding and training to ensure quality work](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Sales and Client Management

  - [Current clients include Reddit, Ramp, and potential deals with various companies](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Need to improve sales process and automate onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Focus on delighting clients rather than maximizing margins (aiming for \~70% margin)](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Demetrios to take over some sales responsibilities, including follow-ups and lead management](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)

### Design and Marketing Needs

  - [Plan to hire a dedicated designer from Brazil or Argentina](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Moving away from fractional design services like Lightbox ($60/hour) for more consistent support](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Immediate need for homepage design before a specific deadline](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

### Operational Improvements

  - [Exploring options for a chief of staff or high-level assistant to offload tasks](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Considering hiring a local person to help with events and administrative tasks](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Need to set up better calendar management and coordination for meetings](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### Upcoming Events and Networking

  - [Planning a CMO breakfast on the 20th and a dinner on the 26th](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Preparing for a panel at Aster and a workshop in New York](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Leveraging network connections for event invitations and business development](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Demetrios to take over sales follow-ups and lead management to reduce Marcel's workload](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Work with Molly to hire a dedicated designer from Brazil or Argentina](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Set up improved calendar management system for better meeting coordination](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Focus on developing a comprehensive training program for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Marcel to spend more time with new hires to transfer knowledge and processes](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Prepare for upcoming events (CMO breakfast, dinner, panel, workshop)](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Consider hiring a local chief of staff or high-level assistant to offload tasks](https://fathom.video/share/sbG9fLs_CJ67ygzMTN4g1zdXnz1bbUcp?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
